curations.review_note: Accepted because the canonical helper extracted from manifest-import-wave1.yml preserves the func_prot_import.R variant, and characterization coverage in test-prot-01-import.R plus test-prot-01b-import-detection-characterization.R freezes the retained parquet/FragPipe detection behavior while the stale mod_prot_import.R duplicate is intentionally retired.

Accepted because the duplicate in func_general_filemgmt.R was intentionally removed in favor of the canonical helper in func_general_helpers.R, and test-general-filemgmt-duplicate-resolution-contracts.R freezes package-level signature parity plus default/helper-only behavior for the surviving implementation.

Accepted because HANDOVER-wave1.md records the explicit manual-merge decision to keep the func_prot_da canonical implementation and retire the da_analysis_function_wrapper duplicate, and test-prot-07b-da-handlers-compat.R freezes the required legacy de_* alias compatibility on the surviving helper.

Accepted because the entrypoint drift reflects wrapper-shell extraction into mod_prot_import_server.R, and test-prot-01c-import-module-contracts.R exercises the public server wrapper for successful-import side effects, default-config fallback, and unsupported-format cleanup.

Accepted because the extracted design-builder wrapper is directly characterized in test-prot-04-design.R, including the public builder entry seam ordering and callback seed handoff through mod_prot_design_builder_server.

Accepted because the helper-seam extraction is covered by test-prot-11-enrichment-module-contracts.R, which exercises the public wrapper for bootstrap, output/download setup, observer registration, and analysis-method delegation through mod_prot_enrich_server.

Accepted because test-prot-12-summary-module-contracts.R exercises the extracted summary wrapper across save, export, copy, GitHub, template status, and report observer seams on mod_prot_summary_server.

Accepted because the extracted lipid DA entry wrapper is exercised through test-lipid-02b-da-module-contracts.R, which sources mod_lipid_da_server.R and runs the DA module contract suite against the public server seam.
Accepted because test-lipid-13-design-builder-seams.R sources mod_lipid_design_builder_server.R and characterizes the extracted public builder seam directly.
Accepted because test-lipid-14-design-module-seams.R sources mod_lipid_design_server.R and exercises the extracted design-module server seam directly.

Accepted because test-lipid-00b-import-module-seams.R sources mod_lipid_import_ui.R and exercises the extracted public UI seam alongside the paired server wrapper.

Accepted because test-lipid-12-norm-module-contracts.R sources mod_lipid_norm_server.R and explicitly characterizes the entry-shell seam plus runtime/bootstrap delegation through the extracted public server wrapper.
Accepted because test-lipid-12-norm-module-contracts.R sources mod_lipid_norm_ui.R and covers the extracted UI helper and public wrapper seams directly.
